languages.text: "Видел". {n}Лицо Зораэля каменеет.{/n} "Именно по его приказу был пленен мой отряд. Некроны безоговорочно подчиняются ему".
"I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."
languages.original_text: "Видел". {n}Лицо Зораэля каменеет.{/n} "Именно по его приказу был пленен мой отряд. Некроны безоговорочно подчиняются ему".

traits.locale_text: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."
"I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."
"I have." {n}Victus's face darkens.{/n} "He was the one who managed to capture us. The Necrons addressed him as 'Overlord.'"
"I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."
"I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."

languages.text: 「捕まえたのは彼だ」{n}ヴィクトゥスの顔色が悪くなった。{/n}「ネクロンの呼び名は『オーバーロード』だ」
languages.original_text: "I have." {n}Victus's face darkens.{/n} "He was the one who managed to capture us. The Necrons addressed him as 'Overlord.'"

traits.locale_text: 「捕まえたのは彼だ」ヴィクトゥスの顔色が悪くなった。「ネクロンの呼び名は『オーバーロード』だ」

languages.text: «Sí». {n}El rostro de Zorael se ensombrece.{/n} «Fue él quien ordenó capturarnos. Los Necrones obedecen sus órdenes sin rechistar».
languages.original_text: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."

traits.locale_text: «Sí». {n}El rostro de Zorael se ensombrece.{/n} «Fue él quien ordenó capturarnos. Los Necrones obedecen sus órdenes sin rechistar».

languages.text: "Das habe ich." {n}Zoraels Gesicht erstarrt zu Stein.{/n} "Er hat unsere Gefangennahme befohlen. Die Necrons gehorchen ihm, ohne Fragen zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."

traits.locale_text: "Das habe ich." {n}Zoraels Gesicht erstarrt zu Stein.{/n} "Er hat unsere Gefangennahme befohlen. Die Necrons gehorchen ihm, ohne Fragen zu stellen."

languages.text: « En effet, {n}déclare Zorael tandis que son visage se ferme.{/n} C'est lui qui a ordonné notre capture. Les Nécrons lui obéissent sans tergiverser. »
languages.original_text: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."

traits.locale_text: « En effet, {n}déclare Zorael tandis que son visage se ferme.{/n} C'est lui qui a ordonné notre capture. Les Nécrons lui obéissent sans tergiverser. »

languages.text: “见过。”{n}佐拉尔神色一沉。{/n}“是他下令俘虏了我们。太空死灵对他唯命是从。”
languages.original_text: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."

traits.locale_text: “见过。”{n}佐拉尔神色一沉。{/n}“是他下令俘虏了我们。太空死灵对他唯命是从。”

languages.text: "Gördüm." {n}Zorael'in yüzü taşa dönüyor.{/n} "Esir alınmamızı emreden oydu. Nekronlar, emirlerine ona sorgusuz sualsiz uyar."
languages.original_text: "I have." {n}Zorael's face turns to stone.{/n} "He was the one who ordered our capture. The Necrons obey him without question."

traits.locale_text: "Gördüm." {n}Zorael'in yüzü taşa dönüyor.{/n} "Esir alınmamızı emreden oydu. Nekronlar, emirlerine ona sorgusuz sualsiz uyar."
